# Shahin Web

> Shahin Web is a digital growth agency founded by Sahin Molla (with co-founder Ashif Akhon), based in Diamond Harbour, West Bengal, serving Kolkata, Delhi, and businesses across India. The 20+ person team delivers performance marketing, video editing, web development, design, AI automation, and e-commerce management.

Key verified results: a sustained 4.1x ROAS on managed ad spend; growth of an e-commerce brand from near zero to 186K monthly sessions (4000%+ in 7 months); a custom REST API on Supabase serving 735+ products; 1000+ videos delivered. Client names are kept private out of respect for their data.

Notable work: official website management for Maulana Wahiduddin Khan (Padma Bhushan laureate); projects for Goodword Books, Goodword India, Goodword Bangla, Medha Care (healthcare), QuestX (edtech), Sky Blue Publication (publishing), CPS Bangla (media), and authors including Saniyasnain Khan, Maria Khan, and Shoaib Ilyas.

Tech stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, Supabase/PostgreSQL, Shopify (Liquid), WordPress, Meta Ads, Google Ads, WhatsApp Business API, Premiere Pro, After Effects, and frontier AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor).

Contact: WhatsApp/phone +91 74777 53500 · sahin@goodwordbooks.com · Free 30-minute strategy call at /book-call.html
Founder profiles: https://www.facebook.com/iamsahin82 · https://www.instagram.com/iamsahin82/
